description: Visual Studio 2022 is open with the 'NumericalUtilities' C# class library solution. The team architect has mandated that all public APIs must have XML documentation. Document all 4 public classes and 16 public methods across Statistics.cs, Interpolation.cs, Conversion.cs, and StringFormatting.cs using XML documentation comments, including appropriate <summary>, <param>, and <returns> tags. Configure the project to generate an XML documentation file and build the solution in Release configuration. The final documentation file must be produced at C:\Users\Docker\source\repos\NumericalUtilities\NumericalUtilities\bin\Release\net6.0\NumericalUtilities.xml.
